title: HOMEWORK CENTER - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY LIBRARY HOMEWORK CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Includes an online research database with information on various topics. Provides live homework help through tutor.com for paper proofreading, math assistance, PSAT practice questions, and study guides. Also offers live tutoring in Spanish as a foreign language. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Live one-on-one help: -7 days per week noon-midnight in English and Spanish -7 days per week 3pm-9pm in Vietnamese Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information and live help FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Online Databases Tutoring Services Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT LITERACY TUTORING EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - CITIZENSHIP CLASSES EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - GED HELP INFORMATION SERVICES - EVENTS AND CLASSES INFORMATION SERVICES - MOBILE AND PARTNER LIBRARIES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - MY DISCOVERY PASS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
